name: SEMrush Map Rank Tracker
description:
What SEMrush Map Rank Tracker Does?

SEMrush Map Rank Tracker helps improve your business ranking on Google Maps for your business and your competitors. It also allows you to customize your tracking experience with a choice of map grid, reporting schedule, and targeting keywords. It also helps produce a heatmap report with your business rankings for every map pin. 

‍

Source: SEMrush

Features 

  • Helps evaluate Google Maps ranking based on user location
  • Easily set up tracking and positioning for your business
  • Customize your tracking experience by setting the preferred map grid size and distance.
  • Set reports on a daily, weekly, or monthly basis
  • Gather insights on competitors and stay ahead in the competitive landscape.

Benefits 

  • Helps measure your progress over time 
  • Helps you track rankings based on user location
  • Provides you with an unlimited number of keywords that you can track
  • Stay ahead of the competition 

Pros 

  • Users like the keyword research tool to get more visibility over what their competitors are doing and help fix issues on the website through suggestions and feedback, if any.

Cons

  • It is a very expensive tool, small businesses might not be able to afford it 

‍

Offers basic features for free, starting at $30 Per Month

‍
